title: N@bayowth #5032
definition:
Nebaioth or Nebajoth = "heights"

 1) a son of Ishmael
 2) people descended from 1 called the Nabateans with their capital
    at Petra
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nebaioth or Nebajoth = "heights"

 1) a son of Ishmael
 2) people descended from 1 called the Nabateans with their capital
    at Petra

    NASB:  oldest son of Ishmael, also his desc.
